AI Overview
Can't generate an AI overview right now. Try again later.
Weekly contact lenses (or bi-weekly/2-week lenses) are soft, reusable lenses worn daily and replaced every 1–2 weeks, offering a balance of comfort, convenience, and lower cost compared to daily disposables. They require nightly cleaning and storing. Popular options include Acuvue Oasys and PRECISION7.
Show more
Show less

Weekly-disposable contact lenses are some of the most popular choices among contact lens wearers. They are generally worn for 1 to 2 weeks and then replaced.
